data.description:
A 3-Acre of beautiful land at Hullahalli is for sale. The following are the salient features of this land : 
GENERAL PROPERTY 

Managed organic farm land 
Including 2 years free maintenance 

295/- per sq ft slightly negotiable 



1) Location : It's about 400 mts from SH 57 which runs through Hullahalli, Nanjangud. 

2) Connectivity : Very good connectivity as it has two approach roads from SH 57 .

 3) This plot is very much attached to the road .

4) The plot of 3 acre is almost square .The buyer can also get it measured. 

5) The buyer will get 180 coconut yielding tress (Also, banana saplings can be planted in the parallel, adjacent lines of Coconut trees) , 3 inch bore, 24/7 power in the 3 acre plot. There's also a drip irrigation system in this plot.

 6) Various options can be worked out by the buyer with this 3-acre plot - 

a) Farm house can be built
 b) Can be converted to residential /commercial and sites can be formed and sold as real estate prices have picked up in this location. 
c) A part of 3-acre can be converted for residential /commercial and the remaining can be used to construct Farm house d) Can be rented out. 

7) Hullahalli is a beautiful place with Kabini River and basic amenities like Schools and Colleges, Function Halls, Park, Government offices, 5 Petrol Stations, Vehicle Showrooms, etc. 

22km from Mysore ring road 

12km from nanjangud taluk 

RTC belongs to hullahalli place 

8) Hullahalli can be reached within 25 minutes from close proximity of Mysore, Mysore Airport and Nanjangud.

 9) price quoting Rs 1.3crore per acre ( 1 crore 30 lakhs per acre)
Negotiable

3.25 lakh per gunta slightly negotiable 

10) 2 acres or 3 acres will be given

For 2 acres 2.60 cr 

For 3 acres 3.8cr slightly negotiable 

Adjacent land is converted 

This land also be converted if required.

This place is suitable for farm house 
School 
Conventional hall 
Brick industry 
Good source of water supply
data.title: Agriculture land

data.description:
Seize the opportunity to build your dream home on this Freehold Plot, which is available for sale in Budigere, Bangalore! Set in a lush, green environment, this spacious plot offers endless possibilities to create a haven tailored to your desires. Perfect for families looking to invest in a future of comfort and convenience, this plot is a rare find in one of Bangalore’s most promising areas.

This plot in Budigere, Bangalore, presents a rare opportunity to create your dream home in a rapidly growing area, making it an ideal investment for both personal and financial growth.

Property Specifications and Facilities

Spread over the dimensions of 30 X 40 sq ft in length and breadth, this piece of land facing the east direction is situated within a well-secured gated colony that guarantees utmost safety to you and your loved ones. This plot comes with strong boundary walls which makes it ready for immediate construction of 3 to 4 floors, thereby offering an ideal space for a spacious family home or a multi-level residence.

Open from two sides, this property has the presence of nearby constructions that further enhance the appeal of this area, making it a sought-after location for residential development. Being situated close to the 10-meter wide main road you can enjoy easy access to several suburbs and important destinations.

Over and above, this plot comes equipped with some of the prime facilities such as a reliable water supply that ensures a hassle-free construction process. Additionally, there is an electricity connection, and an efficient drainage system are all available, providing a strong foundation for your new home. Therefore, whether you're looking to build a comfortable residence or a modern commercial space, this plot is perfectly suited to meet your needs.

Locality

This plot is nestled in the thriving area of Budigere and close to the landmark Budigere Cross from where commuting to and fro is easy as the upcoming metro station is 5 to 6 km away, further enhancing the connectivity of the area. The major means of roadways such as cabs, taxis, and autos are close by, so you can save your travel time.

There are several reputable schools at 1km which makes it an ideal destination for a family with children. For any medical assistance, you can rush to the well-known healthcare centers, nursing homes and clinics that are also at 1km. You will also find a couple of prestigious shopping centers and malls dotted at 1km, ensuring that all your daily needs are met with ease. With banks and ATMs close by, this plot offers a perfect blend of convenience and comfort.
